meta.title: Associate Professor Dr Cetin Karakaya · Founder
meta.description: Mechanical Engineer, R&D and Innovation Project Manager, University–Industry Collaboration Strategist. 25+ years across academia and industry.

hero.name: Associate Professor Dr Cetin Karakaya
hero.tagline: Mechanical Engineer · R&D and Innovation Project Manager · University–Industry Collaboration Strategist

about.heading: About
about.summary: An Associate Professor and engineer with 25+ years of experience across academia and industry in advanced manufacturing, materials and strategic R&D management. He has managed 300+ industrial R&D projects, provided technical consultancy to 100+ industrial and public organisations, and coordinated ~30 R&D Project Markets along the idea-to-product innovation path. He has lived in the UK for 10+ years.

items.desc: The UK's first "deep-link" business verification / trust-scoring engine; surfacing risk by cross-analysing the ownership and director networks of millions of companies.

items.role: Founder · Business Strategy & Immigration Compliance Adviser
items.desc: Strategic market-entry and UKVI compliance advisory for investors and tech founders (Innovator Founder, Global Talent, ECAA Turkish Businessperson).

R&D roadmaps and high-budget manufacturing projects (concept to mass production) for 100+ industrial firms; securing funding from TÜBİTAK, KOSGEB, the Ministry of Industry and Development Agencies; R&D Centre establishment, patent/trademark/quality management.

items.org: Let's Go To UK Consulting Ltd.
items.desc: A strategic bridge for SMEs in UK–Turkey trade; import-export compliance and B2B matchmaking.
Entrepreneurship & Project Management courses; mentoring students from prototype to commercialisation; industry-focused curriculum development.
Head of the Machinery and Metal Technologies Department; industrial internship/placement programmes; vocational curriculum renewal.
Industrial projects in manufacturing technologies, welding and materials science; TÜBİTAK-supported research and scientific publications.

items.title: PhD – Mechanical Engineering
items.org: Sakarya Univ. · UK NARIC equivalence RQF-8
items.desc: Thesis: High-pressure composite hydrogen storage tanks (SAN-TEZ supported).

items.title: BSc – Mechanical Engineering
items.org: Sakarya Univ. · Top of Department (Valedictorian), High Honours
items.desc: Completed the programme one semester early by taking advanced courses.

publications.heading: Publications & Patents
books: The Baird Effect: Reinventing Start-ups in the Age of AI (2025, 205 pp. · available in all Amazon stores)
publications.papers: 16 papers (8 Web of Science) · 42 conference papers

achievements.heading: Achievements
firsts: Through the Industrial R&D Support Unit he founded at the Sakarya Chamber of Commerce and Industry, he raised the province to 1st among all provinces (from 38th) in KOSGEB applications, and from 24th to 8th in TÜBİTAK TEYDEB. (2010–2011)

At Istanbul Commerce University he created Turkey's first accredited entrepreneurship curriculum for engineers, equivalent to the KOSGEB Entrepreneurship Programme; over 1,000 students earned the Applied Entrepreneurship certificate. (2012–2014)
He pioneered the establishment of a KOSGEB-TEKMER (Technology Centre) at Istanbul Commerce University, creating an ecosystem for academics and entrepreneurs to realise R&D projects. (2012–2014)
He pioneered the founding of an incubation centre at Sakarya Technopark and mentored dozens of student/academic projects from idea to commercialisation. (2011–2013)

As founding honorary advisor of the Sakarya Machinery Manufacturers' Association, he provided R&D support to regional industry and prepared the feasibility study for the Machinery Specialised Organised Industrial Zone. (2010–2014)
He voluntarily managed Sakarya's first geographical-indication registrations (Islama Köfte and Dartılı Keşkek) and secured their international registration. (2011)
B2Verify – founder of the UK's first true "deep-link" business verification engine. (2026)
leadership: ~30 R&D Project Market coordinations (2009–2018) – Exporters' Associations (İKMİB, AKİB, OAİB), Chambers of Commerce and Industry, NGOs, universities and technoparks.
Applied training for 3,000+ engineers and entrepreneurs; seminars and project mentoring.
TÜBİTAK BİGG – innovation mentor and project-evaluation juror (2014–2021); one-to-one mentoring of 50+ entrepreneurs.
Member of the ISTKA Project Evaluation Board; member of the Rural Development Projects Evaluation Board, Sakarya Provincial Directorate of Agriculture.
SAN-TEZ doctoral research grant (2009) – resulted in a patent and commercialisation.
KOSGEB R&D Innovation grant (2003) through industry collaboration within his MSc thesis; Top of Department, BSc (2002).
